mod-modal-confirm-entry-animation-durati.description:
Used by `--spectrum-modal-confirm-entry-animation-duration`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-animation-duration-500)`, if not set.

mod-overlay-animation-duration-opened.description:
Used by `--spectrum-modal-confirm-entry-animation-delay`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-modal-confirm-entry-animation-delay, var(--spectrum-animation-duration-200))`, if not set.

mod-modal-confirm-entry-animation-delay.description:
Used by `--spectrum-modal-confirm-entry-animation-delay`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-animation-duration-200)`, if not set.

mod-overlay-animation-duration.description:
Used by `--spectrum-modal-confirm-exit-animation-duration`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-modal-confirm-exit-animation-duration, var(--spectrum-animation-duration-100))`, if not set.

mod-modal-confirm-exit-animation-duratio.description:
Used by `--spectrum-modal-confirm-exit-animation-duration`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-animation-duration-100)`, if not set.

mod-modal-confirm-exit-animation-delay.description:
Used by `--spectrum-modal-confirm-exit-animation-delay`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-animation-duration-0)`, if not set.

mod-modal-transition-animation-duration.description:
Used by `.spectrum-Modal-wrapper`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-animation-duration-100)`, if not set.

mod-modal-confirm-entry-animation-distan.description:
Used by `.spectrum-Modal`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-dialog-confirm-entry-animation-distance)`, if not set.

mod-modal-background-color.description:
Used by `.spectrum-Modal`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-modal-background-color)`, if not set.

mod-modal-confirm-border-radius.description:
Used by `.spectrum-Modal`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-corner-radius-100)`, if not set.

spectrum-modal-confirm-entry-animation-d.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-Modal`.
Used by `.spectrum-Modal.is-open`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-modal-confirm-entry-animation-duration, var(--spectrum-animation-duration-500))`, if not set.

Defined in `.spectrum-Modal`.
Used by `.spectrum-Modal.is-open`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-overlay-animation-duration-opened, var(--mod-modal-confirm-entry-animation-delay, var(--spectrum-animation-duration-200)))`, if not set.

spectrum-modal-confirm-exit-animation-du.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-Modal`.
Used by `.spectrum-Modal`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-overlay-animation-duration, var(--mod-modal-confirm-exit-animation-duration, var(--spectrum-animation-duration-100)))`, if not set.

spectrum-modal-confirm-exit-animation-de.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-Modal`.
Used by `.spectrum-Modal`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-modal-confirm-exit-animation-delay, var(--spectrum-animation-duration-0))`, if not set.

spectrum-modal-fullscreen-margin.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-Modal`.
Used by `.spectrum-Modal--fullscreen`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-modal-fullscreen-margin, 32px)`, if not set.

spectrum-modal-background-color.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-Modal`.
Used by `.spectrum-Modal`.
Defaults to `var(--system-modal-background-color)`, if not set.

system-modal-background-color.description:
Defined in `.spectrum`.
Used by `--spectrum-modal-background-color`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-background-layer-2-color)`, if not set.
